import * as React from "react"
import * as NavigationMenuPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu"
import { ChevronDown } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const navigationMenuNavigationMenuPrimitiveRoot = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    zIndex: "z-10",
    display: "flex",
    maxWidth: "max-w-max",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
});

const NavigationMenu = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root
    ref={ref}
    className={navigationMenuNavigationMenuPrimitiveRoot.class(className)}
    {...props}
  >
    {children}
    <NavigationMenuViewport />
  </NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root>
))
NavigationMenu.displayName = NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root.displayName


const navigationMenuListNavigationMenuPrimitiveList = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    listStyleType: "list-none",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    margin: "space-x-1",
});

const NavigationMenuList = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.List>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.List>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <NavigationMenuPrimitive.List
    ref={ref}
    className={navigationMenuListNavigationMenuPrimitiveList.class(className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
NavigationMenuList.displayName = NavigationMenuPrimitive.List.displayName

const NavigationMenuItem = NavigationMenuPrimitive.Item

const navigationMenuTriggerStyle = tw.variants({
    base: {
        display: "inline-flex",
        height: "h-9",
        width: "w-max",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        justifyContent: "justify-center",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        backgroundColor: "bg-background",
        padding: ["px-4", "py-2"],
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        fontWeight: "font-medium",
        transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
        hover: {
            backgroundColor: "hover:bg-accent",
            color: "hover:text-accent-foreground",
        },
        focus: {
            backgroundColor: "focus:bg-accent",
            color: "focus:text-accent-foreground",
            outlineStyle: "focus:outline-none",
        },
        disabled: {
            pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
            opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
        },
        "data-[state=open]": {
            color: "data-[state=open]:text-accent-foreground",
            backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:bg-accent/50",
            hover: {
                backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:hover:bg-accent",
            },
            focus: {
                backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:focus:bg-accent",
            },
        },
    },
})


const navigationMenuTriggerChevronDown = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    top: "top-[1px]",
    margin: "ml-1",
    height: "h-3",
    width: "w-3",
    transitionProperty: "transition",
    transitionDuration: "duration-300",
    "group-data-[state=open]": {
        rotate: "group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180",
    },
});

const NavigationMenuTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(navigationMenuTriggerStyle(), className)}
    {...props}
  >
    {children}{" "}
    <ChevronDown
      className={navigationMenuTriggerChevronDown.class()}
      aria-hidden="true"
    />
  </NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger>
))
NavigationMenuTrigger.displayName = NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger.displayName

const NavigationMenuContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("left-0 top-0 w-full data-[motion^=from-]:animate-in data-[motion^=to-]:animate-out data-[motion^=from-]:fade-in data-[motion^=to-]:fade-out data-[motion=from-end]:slide-in-from-right-52 data-[motion=from-start]:slide-in-from-left-52 data-[motion=to-end]:slide-out-to-right-52 data-[motion=to-start]:slide-out-to-left-52 md:absolute md:w-auto ", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
NavigationMenuContent.displayName = NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content.displayName

const NavigationMenuLink = NavigationMenuPrimitive.Link


const navigationMenuViewportNavigationMenuPrimitiveViewport = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    margin: "mt-1.5",
    height: "h-[var(--radix-navigation-menu-viewport-height)]",
    width: "w-full",
    overflow: "overflow-hidden",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    borderWidth: "border",
    backgroundColor: "bg-popover",
    color: "text-popover-foreground",
    boxShadow: "shadow",
    md: {
        width: "md:w-[var(--radix-navigation-menu-viewport-width)]",
    },
});

const navigationMenuViewportDiv = tw.style({
    position: "absolute",
    left: "left-0",
    top: "top-full",
    display: "flex",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
});

const NavigationMenuViewport = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Viewport>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Viewport>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div className={navigationMenuViewportDiv.class()}>
    <NavigationMenuPrimitive.Viewport
      className={navigationMenuViewportNavigationMenuPrimitiveViewport.class(className)}
      ref={ref}
      {...props}
    />
  </div>
))
NavigationMenuViewport.displayName =
  NavigationMenuPrimitive.Viewport.displayName


const navigationMenuIndicatorDiv = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    top: "top-[60%]",
    height: "h-2",
    width: "w-2",
    rotate: "rotate-45",
    borderRadius: "rounded-tl-sm",
    backgroundColor: "bg-border",
    boxShadow: "shadow-md",
});

const navigationMenuIndicatorNavigationMenuPrimitiveIndicator = tw.style({
    top: "top-full",
    zIndex: "z-[1]",
    display: "flex",
    height: "h-1.5",
    alignItems: "items-end",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    overflow: "overflow-hidden",
});

const NavigationMenuIndicator = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Indicator>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Indicator>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <NavigationMenuPrimitive.Indicator
    ref={ref}
    className={navigationMenuIndicatorNavigationMenuPrimitiveIndicator.class(className)}
    {...props}
  >
    <div className={navigationMenuIndicatorDiv.class()} />
  </NavigationMenuPrimitive.Indicator>
))
NavigationMenuIndicator.displayName =
  NavigationMenuPrimitive.Indicator.displayName

export {
  navigationMenuTriggerStyle,
  NavigationMenu,
  NavigationMenuList,
  NavigationMenuItem,
  NavigationMenuContent,
  NavigationMenuTrigger,
  NavigationMenuLink,
  NavigationMenuIndicator,
  NavigationMenuViewport,
}
